page: Microsoft Azure M48s_1_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv3 family. It is powered by dedicated Intel processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The configuration features 48 dedicated vCPUs paired with 974.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 20.29 GB per vCPU.

This instance does not include any bundled local storage, though it is designated as Premium Storage capable for external block storage integration. There are no onboard GPUs, and the configuration includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high memory density relative to the compute core count, this server offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring massive RAM footprints without proportional CPU scaling. It is engineered for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large-scale in-memory databases, heavy caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and large-scale data analytics.
description: Microsoft Azure M48s_1_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server features 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 974.0 GB of RAM, providing a substantial 20.29 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable for external disk attachments. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, offering high resource density for workloads that require massive memory footprints relative to compute capacity. It is highly suited for hosting large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and complex data analytics pipelines.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M48s_1_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 974.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M48s_1_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 974.0 GB of RAM, built for large enterprise databases.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring high RAM density and dedicated Intel processors for demanding enterprise database workloads.

974.0 GB of system memory providing 20.29 GB per core
Premium Storage capable for external block storage integration

Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise ERP systems
